name: code_review
description: LLM-powered code review tool — sends a file to Grok 4.20 and returns structured findings

tools.name: code_review
tools.description: Review a source file with Grok 4.20 multi-agent. Returns quality, security, and improvement notes.

file_path.description: Relative or absolute path to the file to review

focus.description: Optional review focus: security | quality | architecture | all (default: all)
